In USA, making girlfriend/boyfriend is natural, but in Japan, people do kokuhaku that means telling love of one person to another one.
There, a person says 'Suki desu, tsukiatte kudasai.'(that means 'I love you, so please be my girlfriend/boyfriend.')
When you meet a Japanese person, he/she might be a son/daughter who was born because of the kokuhaku.]AP[goproblems]
